name: Goob
description: Goob is a kind and sociable Toon. He is energetic and rather innocent. Goob is a humanoid beige craft, with a rounded square-shaped head which has tufts of fluff on the forehead and cheeks. He has light yellowish orange blush underneath his eyes, with blue freckles above the blush on the left, while the right is red. He has a light yellowish orange torso, with tufts of fluff on the neck. He has long, thick, noodley black strings as arms, with the left hand being blue on the right side with red claws- and the right hand being red on the left side with blue ones. Both hands are rounded and large. He also has light yellowish orange stripes on the knees and ankles. He is usually depicted as cross-eyed.
creator: dicondria722
